author: potuz
content: For a NO it doesn't need to be. It can just default to all builders being treated the same way with a default value

author: serenita_io
content:
I agree we should standardize new CLI flags, that has historically been a pain point with clients calling things slightly differently.

**Beacon API**

I would get rid of `min_bid` since the more recent `builder_boost_factor` allows for almost exactly the same thing. Why support two extremely similar things? It's just confusing and overcomplicated. Seems like a good time to say goodbye to `min_bid` which is –in my opinion– the worse of the two options.

**VC configuration**

> Standardized file format

I believe new per-validator-key config options should be handled by extending the Keymanager API. That is exactly what this API is for, right? *(I strongly dislike passing and updating yaml files, much easier to call the standardized API).*

In general, I hope we can keep things reasonably simple, and that we don't overcomplicate all of our codebases to cater to the specific usecases of one or two node operators in the world.

content: Would trusted bids be available only via a direct builder connection? Or will they also be propagated via P2P?
